fundamentals.name: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of fiber-optic networking products in the United States, Taiwan, and China. The company offers optical modules, optical filters, lasers, laser components, subassemblies, transmitters and transceivers, turn-key equipment, headend, node, and distribution equipment, as well as amplifiers. It sells its products to internet data center operators, cable television, telecom equipment manufacturers, fiber-to-the-home, and internet service providers through its direct and indirect sales channels. Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Sugar Land, Texas.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue and strong analyst estimates are offset by current unprofitability and a high forward P/E.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 44.8%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY is very strong.
Analyst growth estimates are exceptionally high for the current quarter (109.4%) and fiscal year (441.7%).
Forward P/E of 38.56 is supported by a PEG ratio of 0.78, suggesting growth may justify the valuation.
Strong liquidity with a current ratio of 3.83 and quick ratio of 2.85.
negatives: The company is currently unprofitable with negative operating and profit margins (-8.6% and -8.5% respectively).
Return on equity (-6.1%) and return on assets (-3.3%) are negative.
Free cash flow is significantly negative at $-445.58M TTM.
High beta of 3.76 indicates substantial volatility relative to the market.

news.paragraph: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) has seen significant attention recently, with one report highlighting major transceiver orders and target price increases, while another notes its impressive 635.5% stock surge over the past six months. The company's story appears to be shifting positively, driven by these developments. Traders should note the upcoming August earnings date as a potential catalyst.
